machine.name: localai/session_rag_context
machine.description: Bistable flip-flop that carries the last RAG routing decision forward through PE perceptual space persist semantics. Each RAG grading cycle fires exactly one sequence (generate / rewrite / abort) and writes a sticky carry to [112:116]. When no sequence fires (no RAG call this push cycle), the PE's carry-forward semantics hold the prior carry value — this IS the bistable hold state.

metadata.author: localAIStack session context builder
metadata.eventSpace: 4D routing signal vector at [60:64]: [generate, rewrite, abort, _]
metadata.bistableNote: SET: one of three sequences fires → writes 1.0 to the matching carry element and 0.0 to the others. HOLD: no sequence fires (no RAG call this cycle) → PE carry-forward preserves the output region unchanged. The three guards partition [0,1]^3 routing-signal space; mutual exclusivity is guaranteed by rag_corrective_cycle upstream.

sequences.name: Carry: last RAG call routed to generate

metadata.description: Fires when rag_corrective_cycle asserts generate (ps[60] >= 0.5). Sets last_generate carry HIGH, clears rewrite/abort carry. PE carry-forward maintains this until the next RAG grading cycle fires a different sequence.

metadata.name: SESS_RAG_GENERATE
metadata.description: element[0]: ps[60] generate HIGH (GTE split at 0.5); elements[1-3]: wildcards (Threshold ±0.5 spans [0,1])

sequences.name: Carry: last RAG call needed a query rewrite

metadata.description: Fires when rag_corrective_cycle asserts rewrite (ps[61] >= 0.5). Sets last_rewrite carry HIGH, clears generate/abort carry.

metadata.name: SESS_RAG_REWRITE
metadata.description: element[1]: ps[61] rewrite HIGH; elements[0,2,3]: wildcards

sequences.name: Carry: last RAG call aborted after max rewrites

metadata.description: Fires when rag_corrective_cycle asserts abort (ps[62] >= 0.5). Sets last_abort carry HIGH — signals downstream consumers that the prior RAG call exhausted its rewrite budget.

metadata.name: SESS_RAG_ABORT
metadata.description: element[2]: ps[62] abort HIGH; elements[0,1,3]: wildcards

inputSequences.name: Direct hit — first-attempt generate
inputSequences.description: rag_corrective_cycle fired generate this cycle. sess-rag-generate fires, writing last_generate carry HIGH. On the next push with no RAG call, no sequence fires and PE carry-forward holds [1,0,0,0].

inputSequences.name: Rewrite needed — poor initial retrieval
inputSequences.description: rag_corrective_cycle fired rewrite. sess-rag-rewrite fires. Carry persists as [0,1,0,0] until the follow-up cycle produces a generate or abort.

inputSequences.name: Abort — max rewrites exhausted
inputSequences.description: rag_corrective_cycle fired abort after 2 rewrites. Carry holds [0,0,1,0] — a persistent signal that the prior session turn could not find sufficient context.

inputSequences.name: Bistable hold — between RAG calls
inputSequences.pattern: all signals 0.0 (no RAG call this push cycle)
inputSequences.description: No routing signals are present — the agent is idle or only topology signals are active. None of the three sequences fires. OR arbiter produces no output. PE carry-forward preserves whichever carry was last written. This is the bistable HOLD state.

metadata.expectedOutput: no output (PE carry-forward preserves prior state)
metadata.notes: All signals < 0.5 → no sequence fires → OR arbiter produces nothing → PE carry persists
